sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39648" key="e)pikathgo/rhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικατηγόρ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n39648.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accusation</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1127d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
